summary: A Fox & Friends television interview segment with DHS Secretary Kristi Noem appearing remotely in a split-screen, with a 'LIVE' bug and chyron 'TRUMP WH PAUSES GREEN CARD LOTTERY AFTER MURDERS,' discussing the pause of the diversity visa lottery. It is a captured cable-news interview, not a stylized or music-driven produced piece.
notable_text: TRUMP WH PAUSES GREEN CARD LOTTERY AFTER MURDERS
